category_sources: source_facts.description says program matching and transformation engine for C code; official Coccinelle homepage describes SmPL-based matching and transformations in C code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is coccinelle; official homepage uses the project name Coccinelle.
docs_sources: Official Coccinelle website has a Documentation page plus homepage overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ecosystem references identify the Inria GitLab repository as the main Coccinelle repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe C code matching, transformations, and SmPL semantic patches.
